blockers.required: Production identity provider, issuer/JWKS or equivalent validation configuration, and credentials
Authorized HTTPS server runtime capable of protecting session secrets and private provider credentials
Deny-public private object storage with tenant/customer namespaces and signed-download support
Upload quarantine and malware scanning provider/workflow
Rick selects and connects Stripe, Square, or PayPal provider-hosted payment flow
Production domain, Secure and HttpOnly cookies, CSRF, CSP, rate limiting, monitoring, and audit retention configuration
A session secret of at least 32 bytes supplied through H38_CUSTOMER_PORTAL_SESSION_SECRET outside the repository
Runtime deployment ID, rollback reference, health result, and tested restore procedure
Cross-tenant, cross-customer, guessed-ID, direct-link, expired-session, upload, download, and mobile tests in the selected production stack

nextExecutableStep: Select the production provider/runtime stack, create repository-external credentials and secrets, populate the authorized runtime configuration, deploy with a rollback point, and run the activation gate plus live isolation tests.
